    Sign in

    Introducing Surface RTX Spark Dev Box

    Built for more.

    Designed to meet the needs of frontier developers. Small enough to sit on your desktop. Powerful enough to create the future.

    Get updates

    Be the first to know

    Surface RTX Spark Dev Box belongs in the hands of makers. Join us and stay in the loop.

    I will receive information, tips, and offers about Surface RTX Spark Dev Box and other Microsoft products and services. Privacy Statement.

    Code on day one.

    Surface RTX Spark Dev Box ships with a developer‑optimized Windows 11 Pro experience, preconfigured for AI development. This minimizes setup time so you can get to code-ready state faster.

    Developer ready. Out of the box.

    The Windows 11 experience is developer-first with Visual Studio Code, GitHub Copilot in Windows Terminal, WSL, and PowerShell 7, all preconfigured and ready to go.*

    A petaflop for your desktop.

    Surface RTX Spark Dev Box delivers GPU-first performance with NVIDIA’s powerful RTX GPU—featuring up to one petaflop of AI compute and 128GB of unified memory. Train and fine-tune AI, by uniting local AI agents and NVIDIA’s full-stack AI platform.

    Monolithic aluminum body.


    Surface RTX Spark Dev Box features an anodized aluminum 3D printed body with 1,000 air vents built into its grid chassis—a nod to its 1,000 teraflops of compute performance.

    Power that keeps its cool.

    A 100W thermal envelope inside an aluminum chassis that doubles as a cooling system. Designed to keep compute power consistent through long training runs.

    Ports for pros.


    Connect peripherals, displays, and more with a full array of ports, including two USB-C® ports, USB-A, HDMI, Ethernet, and a headphone jack.

    Built for developers.

    VS Code, WSL, PowerShell 7 come pre-installed, so you can start coding right out of the box.
     
    Intelligent Terminal brings AI-powered assistance directly into your command line, helping you plan, build, and debug. 
     
    Use the command-line tools you already know with Coreutils for Windows.

    Security from chip to cloud.

    Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is a Windows 11 secured-core PC that works with BitLocker, Microsoft Defender, Entra ID, and Intune to help keep sensitive workloads secure.

    Pre-release product. Features are subject to change prior to launch.

    This product is subject to FCC regulations and has not yet been authorized. Shipment is conditioned on successful FCC equipment authorization. FCC rules do not address applicable consumer protection or contract rights. If authorization is not obtained, applicable purchase terms (including any refund rights) will govern.

    1. [*]

      External monitor and keyboard sold separately
